segments.text: Then the angel I had been talking to returned and got my attention, like waking someone from sleep.
What do you see?
segments.speaker: The Angel

segments.text: he asked me.
I see a lampst and made of solid gold with a bowl at its top having seven lamps on it, each with seven lips.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: I also see olive trees, one to the right and one to the left of the bowl.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Then I asked the angel I was talking to, {
What are these, my lord?
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Don't you know what these are?
segments.speaker: the Angel

segments.text: the angel replied.
No, my lord,
segments.speaker: the Angel

segments.text: I responded.
Then he told me, {
This is the Lord's message to Zerubbabel: Not by might, nor by power, but by my spirit, says the Lord Almighty.
segments.speaker: the Angel

segments.text: Even obstacles as big as mountains will be flattened before Zerubbabel. Finally he will bring out the capstone to shouts of ‘Blessings on it!’
segments.speaker: the Angel

segments.text: Then the Lord gave me another message.
Zerubbabel with his own hands laid the foundations for this Temple, and it will be completed the same way. Then you will know the Lord Almighty has sent me.
For who dares look down on this time of small beginnings? They will be happy when they see the plumb line in Zerubbabel's hand. {
The seven lamps represent the eyes of the Lord which see all over the world.
segments.speaker: the Angel

segments.text: Then I asked the angel, {
What are the two olive trees that st and to the right and the left of the lampst and?
segments.speaker: the Angel

segments.text: And I also asked him, {
What are the two olive branches from which the golden oil pours out from through golden pipes?
segments.speaker: the Angel

segments.text: Don't you know?
segments.speaker: the Angel

segments.text: the angel replied.
No, my lord,
segments.speaker: the Angel

segments.text: I responded.
These are the two who have been anointed who st and by the Lord of all the earth,
segments.speaker: The Angel

segments.text: he replied.
